text: the odds of building a community around snake yoga are low but never zero—just ask Dru, who did exactly that on @instagram and @facebook

Theresa, @theresabutlerinteriors, is an interior designer who has been doing DIY projects for years without ever documenting them…until now. Her @raybanmeta glasses changed that, giving her a hands-free way to capture every stage of her projects before bringing the footage to life in the Edits app. 

"I'm new to Ray-Ban Meta glasses, but using them for craft content will be huge," Theresa says. "So far, I've used them to document throwing on my potter's wheel, gardening, painting mixed media on canvas, and woodworking." 

After she started sharing her unique POV, Theresa’s @instagram community grew over 135% in just two weeks. "The response has been incredible. I've received so many messages from people asking about my process and thanking me for the inspiration. The best interactions made have been from new followers who feel inspired enough to recreate the frame I posted in my Reel using Ray-Ban Meta glasses."
